topic: MN2 hub — staking · market · ledger · /mn2 for status · all balances on masternoder.dk

pinned_info.title: MasterNoder MN2 Hub
pinned_info.body:
Welcome to the MN2 channel. Use `/mn2` for live service status and earn links.

• **Wallet & deposit** — Profile → MN2 wallet (on-chain credits after daemon confirms)
• **Staking** — /explorer?tab=staking · monitor at /staking-monitor/
• **Market** — /explorer?tab=market (limit orders, no custody here)
• **Hosting** — /hosting/ · promo **HOSTMN5** in Shop
• **Earn** — quests, generator, casino MN2 rail — claim rewards on-site only

Gate S: Discord never holds MN2. Link account with `/link CODE` from Casino → Discord tab.

compliance_note: No custody in Discord — MN2 balances, stakes, and withdrawals on masternoder.dk only.
